name: server-first-data-architecture
author: Mustafa
description: Server-first data flow for Next.js App Router apps in front of an HTTP API: fetch in the Server Component and pass props, a Result-style data-access layer that never throws, URL-driven filter state via nuqs, authorization enforced at the API (forbidden() for 403), single-component pages with loading.tsx, and the perceived-performance + resilience patterns around them.

references.title: nuqs — type-safe URL search params state
